title: Secretary General Jens Stoltenberg Congressional Gold Medal Act
short_title: Secretary General Jens Stoltenberg Congressional Gold Medal Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Financial Services.
crs_summary: Secretary General Jens Stoltenberg Congressional Gold Medal Act This bill provides for the award of a Congressional Gold Medal to Jens Stoltenberg in recognition of his contributions to the security, unity, and defense of the North Atlantic Treaty Organization.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Financial Services.
